title: acalypha distans
intro: Acalypha distans, also known as the distant caterpillar plant or wormseed, is a plant species within the Euphorbiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Acalypha distans include its use as an antiseptic and antipyretic, helping to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. In herbal preparations, Acalypha distans is often used in tea or decoctions to treat various ailments, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine as an ingredient in herbal formulas to support immune function and overall well-being.
